global_styles.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Sections use py-24 or py-32. Components use p-8 or p-12. Large negative space to give a 'vit bara' (white only) feeling.

layout_grids.marketing_page: Bento Grid (Mode A) for the 'Varför välja oss?' section. Use large asymmetrical cards.
layout_grids.admin_dashboard: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense but breathable (gap-6).

components.navigation: Sticky, Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) to let white backgrounds subtly shine through. 1px border-b border-slate-100.
components.hero_section: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Two-column layout on desktop: Left = Typography + Booking CTA, Right = Hero Image with slight rounded corners and subtle shadow. OR center-aligned text over a very subtle light background.
components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary: bg-[#166534] hover:bg-[#14532D] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6. Minimal shadow.
components.booking_form: Shadcn Form/Card. Solid white background, 1px border border-slate-200. Clean inputs, green accent focus rings. Includes conditional rendering for 'Annat' option.
components.services_cards: Flat rectangular cards. No heavy shadows. Light border (border-slate-100), gentle hover translation (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.admin_table: Shadcn Table component inside a white card for bookings list. Status badges using soft pastel backgrounds with darker text.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 and shadow-md for interactive cards.
motion.entrance: Framer Motion staggered fade-in up for grids (initial opacity 0, y 20).
motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling recommended for the marketing page.

images.description: Bright Scandinavian living room, sunlight, very clean (Hero background or primary image)
Minimal clean office space for Kontorsstädning service card
Chic Scandinavian living room for Hemstädning service card
Flat lay of brown glass bottle and green leaf representing Pur-Eco Svanenmärkt products

media.icons_strategy: Use 'lucide-react' for all functional icons (leaf, water, checkmarks). For the logo, if a specific image asset exists in the repo, use it. Otherwise, construct it using lucide-react (<Leaf /> + <Droplets />) + text 'PureNorth Städ' to match the user's logo description.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid='...' to all interactive elements like booking form inputs, submit buttons, and navigation links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the app contains a seamless marketing-to-booking flow on the home page. All content MUST be in Swedish. The booking form MUST conditionally show a text area if 'Annat' (Other) is selected in the services dropdown. Admin dashboard should have a simple view of bookings submitted. Strictly stick to a white-dominant (#FFFFFF and #F9FAFB) color palette. Use Forest Green (#166534) for primary CTAs to evoke the 'nature' vibe. Don't use heavy shadows, keep the UI flat and minimal. Text should be high contrast. Execute these instructions directly in Javascript/JSX.
